pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 21 migration and Spring Boot 3 requirements.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x is incompatible with Java 21 features and Jakarta EE 9+ namespaces required by Spring Boot 3.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: The build must target Java 21 to utilize new language features and ensure compatibility with the upgraded runtime.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit dependency for Flyway MySQL support, which is no longer bundled in the core module in newer versions.
pom.xml.why_exists: Runtime failure: Flyway cannot connect to MySQL without the specific database adapter dependency.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace javax.mail with jakarta.mail-api to comply with the Jakarta EE namespace migration in Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compile error: The javax.mail package does not exist in the Jakarta EE 9+ environment used by Spring Boot 3.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add lombok-mapstruct-binding dependency to resolve annotation processor ordering issues between Lombok and MapStruct.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compile error: MapStruct may fail to generate code correctly if Lombok processes classes before MapStruct without the binding.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update MySQL connector artifact coordinates to the new groupId and artifactId used in MySQL Connector/J 8.0+.
pom.xml.why_exists: Build failure: The old artifact 'mysql:mysql-connector-java' is deprecated/removed in favor of 'com.mysql:mysql-connector-j'.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version that supports the 'release' flag and modern Java compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Build failure: Older compiler plugins may not support the 'release' flag or Java 21 compilation correctly.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated 'source' and 'target' compiler options with the modern 'release' option.
pom.xml.why_exists: Build warning/error: 'source' and 'target' are deprecated in favor of 'release' for cross-compilation and module path handling in modern JDKs.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.general_idea: Migrate servlet API import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE 9+ standards.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.why_exists: The javax.servlet package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3; using it causes a compile error (package not found) on JDK 21 with the new dependencies.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.general_idea: Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with WebSecurityCustomizer bean for ignoring public paths.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.why_exists: WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter was deprecated in Spring Security 5.7 and removed in Spring Security 6.0; extending it causes a compile error in Spring Boot 3.x.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.general_idea: Replace deprecated HttpSecurity configure method with SecurityFilterChain bean for defining security rules.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.why_exists: WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter.configure(HttpSecurity) is removed in Spring Security 6.0; the application fails to compile without defining a SecurityFilterChain bean.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.before:
@Override
    protected void configure(HttpSecurity http) throws Exception {
        http.antMatcher("/secured/**")
            .addFilterBefore(preAuthFilter(), RequestHeaderAuthenticationFilter.class)
            .authenticationProvider(preAuthProvider())
            .authorizeRequests()
            .anyRequest().authenticated()
            .and()
            .sessionManagement().sessionCreationPolicy(STATELESS)
            .and()
            .httpBasic().disable()
            .csrf().disable()
            .formLogin().disable()
            .logout().disable();
    }

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.general_idea: Update request matcher API from antMatchers to requestMatchers.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.why_exists: antMatchers is deprecated and removed in Spring Security 6.0; using it causes a compile error.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.general_idea: Update security matcher API from antMatcher to securityMatcher.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.why_exists: antMatcher is deprecated and removed in Spring Security 6.0; using it causes a compile error.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.general_idea: Update authorization API from authorizeRequests to authorizeHttpRequests with lambda syntax.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.why_exists: authorizeRequests is deprecated and removed in Spring Security 6.0; using it causes a compile error.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.general_idea: Update session management API to use lambda syntax.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.why_exists: The fluent API for session management changed in Spring Security 6.0; the old chaining style is no longer valid.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.general_idea: Update httpBasic API to use lambda syntax.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.why_exists: The fluent API for httpBasic changed in Spring Security 6.0; the old chaining style is no longer valid.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.general_idea: Update csrf API to use lambda syntax.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.why_exists: The fluent API for csrf changed in Spring Security 6.0; the old chaining style is no longer valid.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.general_idea: Update formLogin API to use lambda syntax.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.why_exists: The fluent API for formLogin changed in Spring Security 6.0; the old chaining style is no longer valid.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.general_idea: Update logout API to use lambda syntax.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.why_exists: The fluent API for logout changed in Spring Security 6.0; the old chaining style is no longer valid.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/domain/.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/domain/.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist' on JDK 21 with Spring Boot 3.
